rationale: The cited paper is topically aligned with core constructs in the citing study: both analyze online stranger/firmer responses and explicitly model response speed (citing: response time as an FGC element; cited: response speed as a key determinant of judged value). Given this construct-level overlap and the citing paper’s positioning against prior social-media response research, this citation could plausibly serve as a substantive mechanism/foundational source rather than a generic mention.
